articles.title: Quote of the Day by Republican Mitt Romney on success in business: 'Being number one isn't just…'
articles.description: Success in business requires outperforming competitors, not just doing well. Mitt Romney emphasizes that second place is often overlooked, and survival hinges on being number one, which offers advantages like better talent and brand trust.
